my_thoughts: 'Other therapists have said that I have a tendency to be passiveag'—student presents as detached reporting. Teacher's move uses subject_object_inversion: 'And you? Is it your opinion that you are passive-aggressive?'. Strategy: redirects to self, demands ownership. Hypothesis: subject_object_inversion mechanism will create no_clear_effect. Watching how student responds to this intervention.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student says 'Other therapists have said that I have a tendency to be passiveag' showing detached_reporting via externalization, intellectualization. Teacher responds 'And you? Is it your opinion that you are passive-aggressive?' using subject_object_inversion to redirects to self, demands ownership. Opening SELF-MAKING move addresses detached_reporting. Predicting no_clear_effect because subject_object_inversion interventions typically produce this response pattern.
